PostSnail
Admin Forest Manifesto Docs Media Kit

Creator and developer docs

PostSnail Documentation

Everything needed to write a microblog, publish it as static files, register it in Forest, and understand the proof architecture.

How To Use PostSnailCreate identity, write posts, attach images, export backups, and download a signed ZIP. Publish On Cloudflare PagesUpload the generated static bundle and verify public proof files. PostSnail ConceptThe local-first publishing model, Forest tracker role, and trust boundaries. PostSnail ArchitectureAdmin modules, static bundle shape, proof files, registry Worker, and extension points. PostSnail LegalApache-2.0 license, NOTICE attribution, third-party notices, logo provenance, and Forest cost notes.

© 2026 Boaz Alhadeff. PostSnail is Apache-2.0 licensed; redistributed copies must preserve NOTICE attribution. See Legal and Third-party notices.
